name: legalquants
description: Official LegalQuants Claude Code plugin. Read-only access to the LegalQuants community knowledge corpus for approved members.

plugins.name: lq
plugins.description: LegalQuants community access — chat MCP, /lq cold-start interview ('I know you' greeting for active members), /lq:assess workflow. Members sign in via Firebase device-code flow (Google → 7-day session cookie, verified keylessly); guests use a shared bearer. v0.2.5.
